title: dryopteris glabra
intro: Dryopteris glabra, also known as the smooth wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Dryopteris. It is native to Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Dryopteris glabra can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
